sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 2.9g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a grain, carb quality matters a lot.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 2.9g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a grain, carb quality matters a lot.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 77.2g. glycemic impact is a big part of the story. for grains, the real question is whether those carbs come with enough fibre and stability.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 77.2g. glycemic impact is a big part of the story. for grains, the real question is whether those carbs come with enough fibre and stability.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 7.9g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. protein helps, but grains still need the carb side to stay under control.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 7.9g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. protein helps, but grains still need the carb side to stay under control.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin e at 1% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin e at 1% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 35% DV, zinc at 13% DV, iron at 8% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 35% DV, zinc at 13% DV, iron at 8% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first. easy staple to build meals around because very practical in everyday meal planning. better category fit than white rice because at least retains more fibre and micronutrients than more refined versions. often easy for people to tolerate because a practical plus in some contexts.

closing.summary: Brown Rice stands out for easy staple to build meals around and better category fit than white rice. but it also gets held back by fibre is only moderate for a strong grain and glycemic behaviour is only okay. Best when you want a staple carb that actually brings something useful with it.
